cards.example: Please send the invoice by end of day.
The marketing budget was increased by ten percent.
Annual revenue reached five million euros.
All expenditure must be approved in advance.
The profit margin improved in Q3.
Positive cash flow is essential for growth.
All companies must pay corporate tax.
Submit receipts for expense reimbursement.
Quarterly results will be published next week.
The forecast shows a five percent growth.
An external audit is scheduled for November.
The company's assets include machinery and property.
All liabilities must be listed in the balance sheet.
Overheads include rent, utilities, and salaries.
The government offered a subsidy to small businesses.
The interest rate is fixed at three percent.
Our fiscal year ends in March.
The balance sheet shows the company's financial position.
Accounts payable are settled within thirty days.
Accounts receivable have increased this quarter.
